items.title: Captain America: The First Avenger

items.overview: Peggy Carter takes on a mission after the events of World War II.

items.writer: Anna Boden, Ryan Fleck, Geneva Robertson-Dworet
items.overview: Carol Danvers discovers her past and becomes one of the universe's most powerful heroes.

items.overview: Tony Stark builds the first Iron Man armor and begins a cinematic universe.

items.overview: Tony Stark faces legacy, rivalry, and the costs of revealing his identity.

items.title: The Incredible Hulk
items.overview: Bruce Banner searches for a cure while being hunted by forces seeking his power.

items.overview: Phil Coulson handles a gas-station robbery on his way to New Mexico.

items.overview: A banished Asgardian prince learns humility on Earth.
